source.title: Accident Investigation Report - South Pass Block 83 Platform A

context.region: Gulf of Mexico - South Pass Block 83

actions_taken: IP reported injury to HSE Technician at 1510 hours
Wound cleaned and bandaged on site
IP evacuated via helicopter at 1657 hours to Houma-Terrebonne airport
IP transported to Occupation Medical Services in Houma, LA
IP released to return to work without restrictions
event.summary: On 21 September 2023 at approximately 1505 hours, an injury occurred on South Pass Block 83 Platform A during plug and abandonment operations. A three-person crew was reinstalling a 12-inch PIG launcher cap onto gas pipeline PIG launcher KZZ-602 after pipeline flushing operations. The lever arm assembly that assists in positioning the cap had become damaged during removal, forcing the crew to manually lift the cap. The crew mistakenly believed the cap was securely threaded and lessened their hold, causing it to fall. The sharp edge of the lever arm shaft penetrated the injured person's cut-resistant gloves, causing a laceration to the right hand. The IP was evacuated by helicopter and treated with eleven sutures at an onshore medical facility.

hazards.name: Heavy equipment with sharp edges during manual handling

threats.name: Damaged lever arm assembly requiring manual lifting
Mistaken belief that cap was securely threaded
Sharp edges on lever arm shaft not mitigated
Corrosion seizing cap onto PIG launcher

controls.name: Job Safety Analysis (JSA)
controls.lod_basis: Primary planning and hazard identification tool

supporting_text: the Job Safety Analysis (JSA) did not include sequential steps or guidance on how to prevent corrosion from seizing the cap onto the PIG launcher
The JSA also lacked guidance on how to eliminate or establish safety measures to prevent personnel from coming into contact with sharp edges
The JSA was not updated once the davit/swing arm was broken

controls.name: Mechanical lifting equipment (chain hoist)
controls.barrier_role: Prevent manual handling of heavy objects
controls.lod_basis: Primary physical control to eliminate manual handling hazard

supporting_text: The contractor's tool house did not have equipment such as a chain hoist available, and the need for one was not identified before the project mobilization

While the JSA recognized the hazard of 'falling tools or objects' and provided recommendations to reduce the hazard, the guidance to 'secure to prevent dropping and causing injury or damage' was not followed

controls.name: Davit/swing arm assembly
controls.lod_basis: Primary mechanical control for safe cap handling

supporting_text: During the removal of the cap, the lever arm assembly that assists in positioning the cap on and off the launcher became damaged
This forced the crew to have to manually lift the cap back into place for reinstallation
The JSA was not updated once the davit/swing arm was broken

controls.name: Stop Work Authority (SWA)
controls.barrier_role: Empower workers to halt unsafe work
controls.lod_basis: Secondary defense when hazards are recognized during work

supporting_text: Additionally, personnel and leadership involved in the task failed to use the Stop Work Authority (SWA) when they recognized that equipment was not available
They did not halt the task until equipment or repairs could be afforded to secure the cap from becoming a dropped object

controls.name: Cut-resistant gloves
controls.barrier_role: Personal protective equipment against sharp edges
controls.lod_basis: Last line of defense for hand protection

supporting_text: the sharp edge of the lever arm shaft penetrated his cut-resistant gloves and caused a laceration to the IP's right hand

controls.name: Sharp edge mitigation/guarding
controls.barrier_role: Physical barrier to prevent contact with sharp edges
controls.lod_basis: Primary control to eliminate sharp edge hazard

supporting_text: following the removal, and prior to re-installation, the sharp edges of the shaft of the pig launcher cap were not mitigated prior to performing the job, which would have shielded personnel from contact
The JSA also lacked guidance on how to eliminate or establish safety measures to prevent personnel from coming into contact with sharp edges

controls.name: Verbal communication and coordination between crew
controls.barrier_role: Ensure coordinated action during manual handling
controls.lod_basis: Primary human performance tool for coordinated tasks

supporting_text: Lack of verbal communication and preparedness between the three workers before two of the three released their grip/hold

they rotated the cap and mistakenly believed that a few threads had connected, which would have secured the cap onto the PIG launcher. At this time, they lessened their hold on the cap which caused it to fall

controls.name: HSE Technician on location
controls.lod_basis: Post-incident response to minimize injury severity

supporting_text: At approximately 1510 hours, the IP reported the injury to the Health Safety and Environment (HSE) Technician on location
The IP and HSE Technician removed the IP's glove and evaluated the injury
The IP's wound was cleaned and bandaged

controls.name: Emergency evacuation procedures
controls.barrier_role: Transport injured personnel to medical care
controls.lod_basis: Post-incident response to provide medical treatment

supporting_text: At approximately 1657 hours, the IP departed SP 83 A via helicopter enroute to Houma-Terrebonne airport
The IP arrived at KHUM at approximately 1730 hours, was met by a River Rental Tools, Inc (RRT) HSE manager, and transported to Occupation Medical Services in Houma, LA

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
